name: paraloom
description: Run Paraloom AI-search visibility experiments end to end: research a topic, ground prompts in real search demand, baseline LLM responses, design the experiment, draft the article, run the pre-publish review battery (hygiene, NCUA compliance, ADA, fact-check), package for the FI sign-off, and publish the client deliverable. Bundles the Paraloom MCP connector so there is nothing to wire up by hand.
